name: Leather Armor
description: The breastplate and shoulder protectors of this armor are made of leather that has been stiffened.

name: Studded Leather
description: Made from tough but flexible leather, studded leather is reinforced with close-set rivets or spikes.

name: Chain Shirt
description: Made of interlocking metal rings, a chain shirt is worn between layers of clothing or leather.

name: Scale Mail
description: This armor consists of a coat and leggings of leather covered with overlapping pieces of metal.

name: Breastplate
description: A fitted metal chest piece worn with supple leather.

name: Half Plate
description: Consists of shaped metal plates that cover most of the wearer's body.

name: Ring Mail
description: Leather armor with heavy rings sewn into it.

name: Chain Mail
description: Made of interlocking metal rings, chain mail includes a layer of quilted fabric worn underneath.

name: Splint Armor
description: Made of narrow vertical strips of metal riveted to a backing of leather.

name: Plate Armor
description: Plate armor consists of shaped, interlocking metal plates to cover the entire body.

name: Dagger
description: A versatile blade that can be concealed.

name: Handaxe
description: A light axe for hacking and throwing.

name: Javelin
description: A light spear designed for throwing.

name: Mace
description: A heavy-headed club for crushing armor.

name: Quarterstaff
description: A simple wooden staff.

name: Spear
description: A simple polearm with a pointed tip.

name: Battleaxe
description: A versatile axe favored by warriors.

name: Greataxe
description: A massive axe capable of devastating blows.

name: Greatsword
description: A massive two-handed sword.

name: Longsword
description: A classic blade favored by knights and adventurers.

name: Rapier
description: A slender blade designed for swift lunges.

name: Scimitar
description: A curved blade for slashing.

name: Shortsword
description: A versatile short-range blade.

name: Warhammer
description: A versatile hammer for crushing foes.

name: Shortbow
description: A light wood bow that is easy to handle.

name: Longbow
description: A powerful bow for long-range engagement.

name: Hand Crossbow
description: A small, one-handed crossbow.

name: Light Crossbow
description: A simple crossbow.

name: Shield
description: A shield increases your Armor Class by 2.

name: Potion of Healing
description: Regains 2d4 + 2 hit points.

name: Holy Symbol
description: A representation of a god or pantheon used for divine spells.

name: Thieves' Tools
description: Used for picking locks and disarming traps.

name: Spellbook
description: Essential for wizards for recording spells.

name: Backpack
description: A leather pack for holding your gear.

name: Explorer's Pack
description: Includes backpack, bedroll, mess kit, tinderbox, 10 torches, 10 days of rations, waterskin, and 50 feet of rope.

name: Burglar's Pack
description: Includes backpack, 1000 ball bearings, 10ft string, bell, 5 candles, crowbar, hammer, 10 pitons, hooded lantern, 2 days rations, and tinderbox.

name: Crowbar
description: Using a crowbar grants advantage on Strength checks where its leverage can be applied.

name: Hempen Rope (50ft)
description: A standard 50-foot length of hempen rope.

name: Tinderbox
description: Contains flint, fire steel, and tinder.

name: Mess Kit
description: A set of eating utensils and plates.

name: Alchemist's Supplies
description: Used for creating alchemical substances.

name: Smith's Tools
description: Used for crafting and repairing metal items.

name: Arcane Focus: Orb
description: An orb used as a spellcasting focus for arcane spells.

name: Arcane Focus: Staff
description: A staff used as a spellcasting focus for arcane spells.

name: Druidic Focus: Wooden Staff
description: A wooden staff used as a druidic spellcasting focus.

name: Component Pouch
description: A small leather pouch containing spell components.
